meaning: n.[植]藏红花,干藏红花粉(用于食品上色和调味的)金黄色,桔黄色adj.藏红花色的
examples: She puts it on, ties a saffron-colored kerchief round her neck, and then the gown looks whiter.
This is the land of Manchego cheese and saffron.
the grand ideal of the dark spirit, a young soul saffron.
The first saffron rays of sunrise bled into the deep purple sky above the Chobe River.
Orton was born in Leicester in 1933 and grew up on the Saffron Lane estate.
